name: Alessio

skills.name: Rebellious Little Hawk
skills.description: Basic Attacks deal area damage and extra physical damage.

skills.name: Upgraded Shell
skills.description: Enhances his next 3 Basic Attacks to deal extra physical damage in a greater area.

skills.name: Legendary Hero Debut
skills.description: Throws a smoke bomb, creating a cloud of smoke that grants Stealth to teammates within it, including himself. The bomb's explosion sends him airborne, and his Basic Attacks allow him to stay airborne longer.

skills.name: Sunset Fireworks Show
skills.description: Leaps into the air and fires several shells, each shell dealing physical damage to the target in the area. Up to 1 enemy can take a shell for the target.

skillsZh.name: 不羈「小火鷹」
skillsZh.description: 萊西奧的普攻具有範圍攻擊效果，並可造成額外物理傷害。

skillsZh.name: 限定版強化彈
skillsZh.description: 萊西奧裝填強化彈，強化後續3次普攻，強化普攻具有更大的範圍攻擊效果和額外物理傷害。

skillsZh.name: 傳奇英雄登場
skillsZh.description: 萊西奧扔出煙霧彈製造煙霧，為自身和友軍提供隱身效果，同時自身升空，在空中普攻會延長滯空時間。

skillsZh.name: 日落海煙火秀
skillsZh.description: 萊西奧躍向高空對敵發射飛彈，每發飛彈對爆炸範圍內目標造成物理傷害。至多一名敵軍可為其分攤一枚飛彈。

tips: Build: Boots of Dexterity, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade.
tipsZh: 萊西奧（發育路）：梯度 A，勝率 51.78%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：急速戰靴、影刃、無盡戰刃.

patchHistory.change: Increased the Ultimate's base cooldown, but kept its cooldown the same as before at max level.
patchHistory.detail: Alessio's mechanics made him one of the most powerful marksmen in the late-game. However, he's currently also able to use his ult to frequently deal burst damage and even achieve the Extreme Escape feat in the early game. We hope these light adjustments will make players use a wider variety of skills to gain an early-game advantage, while at the same time not affecting Alessio's late-game prowess.

patchHistoryZh.change: Increased the Ultimate's base cooldown, but kept its cooldown the same as before at max level.
patchHistoryZh.detail: Alessio's mechanics made him one of the most powerful marksmen in the late-game. However, he's currently also able to use his ult to frequently deal burst damage and even achieve the Extreme Escape feat in the early game. We hope these light adjustments will make players use a wider variety of skills to gain an early-game advantage, while at the same time not affecting Alessio's late-game prowess.

faqs.question: Is Alessio good in current season?
faqs.answer: Alessio is Tier A Marksman with 51.78% win rate, 1.2% pick rate, and 0.03% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Alessio build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Dexterity, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade, Bloodweeper, Daybreaker's Virtue, Overlord's Might.

faqs.question: How to counter Alessio?
faqs.answer: Pick Arke, Lady Sun. Strong into Mai Shiranui, Lian Po.

faqsZh.question: 萊西奧 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 萊西奧 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.78%、選取 1.2%、禁用 0.03%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 萊西奧 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：急速戰靴、影刃、無盡戰刃、泣血之刃、仁者破曉、強者破軍.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 萊西奧？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Arke、Lady Sun。萊西奧 克制 Mai Shiranui、Lian Po。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Mai Shiranui, Lian Po. Weak into: Arke, Lady Sun.
metaAnalysisZh: 克制：Mai Shiranui、Lian Po；被克制：Arke、Lady Sun

guide.overview: Alessio is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.5% win rate and 0.9% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Alessio: Alessio's Basic Attacks deal area damage, plus extra physical damage.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Sparkforged Dagger, Boots of Dexterity, Eternity Blade, then complete Bloodweeper, Shadow Ripper, Daybreaker's Virtue. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Dominator for stats that match Alessio's Marksman kit. Take Haste & Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Upgraded Shell → Legendary Hero Debut → Sunset Fireworks Show → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 1 → Skill 2 → Sunset Fireworks Show (max Skill 1 first)
skillOrder.reason: Upgraded Shell is your lane trade tool. Legendary Hero Debut second. Sunset Fireworks Show whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Upgraded Shell → Legendary Hero Debut → Sunset Fireworks Show → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Alessio is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.5% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.9% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Alessio.
comparisons: Alessio vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Alessio has +2.2% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Alessio when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Alessio vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Alessio has +1.4% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Alessio when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Alessio excels into Mai Shiranui, Lian Po. Avoid blind picking into Arke, Lady Sun without team peel.
